title: phymatopteris taeniata var. borneensis
intro: Phymatopteris taeniata var. borneensis, also known as the Bornean variety of Phymatopteris taeniata, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine, particularly in Malaysia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phymatopteris taeniata var. borneensis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which have been used in traditional medicine for centuries.
